what_happened: Co-headlined two products in the /invest hero. Operator rejected hard.
root_cause: Tried to give both products equal billing instead of choosing one.
fix: One product per landing. Other products become quiet doors near footer.

what_happened: Hero sub-paragraph was 80 words. Operator collapsed to ~30.
root_cause: Treated hero sub as place to explain everything.
fix: Hero sub max 30 words. The first sentence does work, doesn't warm up.

what_happened: Led with 'we sit on your side' before saying what the product is.
root_cause: Marketing instinct to establish empathy before substance.
fix: Lead with product. Posture follows naturally from the work.

what_happened: Framed product as static ticker list. Operator reframed: 'stocks keep changing — the product is the AI Council + HITL loop, not the ticker list.'
root_cause: Defaulted to showing output instead of process.
fix: Showcase = snapshot, not menu. Frame products as process where the ticker list rotates.
promoted_to: VOICE.md (signature line: 'The names rotate. The discipline doesn't.')

what_happened: Shipped 「預約 30 分鐘第一次聊聊」 and 「都在你手上」 to invest.html. Operator flagged as translator-tells.
root_cause: Auto-translated from English source instead of writing native Taipei register.
fix: 繁中 from scratch in Taipei street register, never EN→ZH translation.
promoted_to: VOICE.md zh section, REJECTIONS.md word table

what_happened: Built a splash/loading overlay for /invest. Operator killed it.
root_cause: Phone-app pattern misapplied to editorial page.
fix: Real pages render content immediately. No splash. No loading screen on routes that have content to show.

what_happened: Added /desk/* routes assuming Cloudflare-style routing. All returned 404.
root_cause: Forgot anchor-preview.cjs has hard-coded route allowlist.
fix: All new routes require explicit branch in tools/anchor-preview.cjs.

what_happened: Asked for 'recommended buy price' as a single number. Honest answer: we cannot output a single number on draft inputs without it being a fake.
root_cause: Pressure to give a precise verdict from imprecise data.
fix: Zones, not numbers. BUY ZONE / WATCH / WAIT verdicts. Receipt-gate must pass before any BUY signal.

what_happened: MOPS landing page returned 0 hits on heuristic regex scrape.
root_cause: MOPS landing is a frameset that requires POST/iframe interaction.
fix: Fetcher records URL + analyst note instead of inventing hits. Future: switch to t05st02 POST endpoint.

what_happened: Multiple anchor-preview server restart attempts failed with exit -1 in single command chains.
root_cause: chained pkill + nohup + curl in one Bash call breaks under sandbox shell quoting.
fix: Use run_in_background flag for server boot, then BashOutput to verify.

what_happened: Voice rules lived in /memories/personal/ where AI agents in fresh sessions cannot see them.
root_cause: Treated voice as personal preference instead of repo doctrine.
fix: All build-quality rules live in /doctrine/ in-repo, version-controlled, lintable. Memory is for operator habits only.
